title: Vasaron's Vanilla Plus+
description: Modpack aiming to improve default Minecraft
body:
## 💬 Information:
This [**modpack**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) is a collection of mods I use to improve my own game experience. If you are like me and felt that just default vanilla feel of [**Minecraft**](https://www.minecraft.net/) has come a little dull then this modpack brings some awsome mods to help bring a new experience into Minecraft without going crazy. The mods chosen is what I believe would just fit right in the vanilla feel of Minecraft without going crazy and changing the whole game. This modpack is diverse with performance mods, overworld, mechanics and etc.

## 🔧 Installation:
1. When installing the modpack is will be in a [**.mrpack**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802351-modrinth-modpack-format-mrpack) file format which is a format used to import modpacks into the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app). Inside the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app) at the bottom-left corner you should see a green plus sign click that then select From File and select where the [**.mrpack**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802351-modrinth-modpack-format-mrpack) file is located at and afterwards the modpack will begin to process inside the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app).
   
2. If you don't plan on using the [**Modrinth App**](https://modrinth.com/app) and instead would like to run them through the [**Minecraft launcher**](https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/minecraft-launcher/9PGW18NPBZV5) using your mods folder then here is how. First make sure you have the latest version of [**Fabric 1.20.2**](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) installed. Then locate your [**.minecraft directory**](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/.minecraft) and inside you should see a folder called "**mods**" and if not then create one since [**Fabric**](https://fabricmc.net/) will automatically read it. Now you need to convert the [**.mrpack**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802351-modrinth-modpack-format-mrpack) file to a [**zip file**](https://experience.dropbox.com/resources/what-is-a-zip-file) and to do that you can use this [**website converter**](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/) and it will automaticlly convert the file with all the mods. Extract the zip file using either [**WinRAR**](https://www.win-rar.com/) or [**7Zip**](https://www.7-zip.org/) and inside the now modpack folder should be all the mods ending with [**.jar**](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/jar-files-java/). Finnaly just move all those [**.jar**](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/jar-files-java/) files inside your "**mods**" folder and then run the [**Fabric 1.20.2**](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) version you installed and enjoy.

## 🧰 Featured Mods:
📗│Optional mods:
- [Structory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory)
- [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [Steve's Realistic Sleep](https://modrinth.com/mod/stevesrealisticsleep)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
- [Spawn Animations](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spawn-animations)
- [More Mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-mobs)
- [No Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/no_fog)
- [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)

## 🌠 Future Updates:
> I do plan on trying my best to update the modpack to differnt version while also expermenting with more mods in the future but for now this is what I got so far so enjoy!.
